# Java Docker Images

Last generated: 2026-06-20

Images are published to:

```text
ghcr.io/michlip-eu/generic/java
```

The workflow builds every pinned Java version for both `linux/amd64`
and `linux/arm64`.

## Variants

| Variant | Base image pattern | Tags | Contents |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `full` | `eclipse-temurin:<version>-jdk-jammy` | `latest`, `28`, `28` | Official runtime image with Debian or default upstream tooling. |
| `alpine` | `eclipse-temurin:<version>-jdk-alpine` | `latest-alpine`, `28-alpine`, `28-alpine` | Official Alpine runtime image where upstream publishes one. |

## Tag Rules

For each exact version, CI publishes both variants:

```text
ghcr.io/michlip-eu/generic/java:<version>
ghcr.io/michlip-eu/generic/java:<version>-alpine
```

The newest patch in each release line also gets line aliases:

```text
ghcr.io/michlip-eu/generic/java:<line>
ghcr.io/michlip-eu/generic/java:<line>-alpine
```

The newest resolved version also gets latest aliases:

```text
ghcr.io/michlip-eu/generic/java:latest
ghcr.io/michlip-eu/generic/java:latest-alpine
```

## Status Meanings

| Status | Meaning |
| --- | --- |
| Current | Newest pinned version on the newest pinned release line. Prefer this for new work. |
| Supported | Newest pinned version on another current pinned line. |
| Superseded | Older patch in a current pinned release line. Kept for reproducibility. |
| Deprecated | Older release line. Kept only for legacy rebuilds. |

Java images are based on Eclipse Temurin JDK tags. Prefer current or LTS lines such as 21 and 17 when applicable.

## Published Versions

| Version | Full image tag | Alpine image tag | Alias tags | Status |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [`28`](java/28.md) | `28` | `28-alpine` | `latest`, `latest-alpine`, `28`, `28-alpine` | Current |
| [`27`](java/27.md) | `27` | `27-alpine` | `27`, `27-alpine` | Supported |
| [`24`](java/24.md) | `24` | `24-alpine` | `24`, `24-alpine` | Deprecated |
| [`21`](java/21.md) | `21` | `21-alpine` | `21`, `21-alpine` | Deprecated |
| [`17`](java/17.md) | `17` | `17-alpine` | `17`, `17-alpine` | Deprecated |

## Version Sources

CI refreshes this runtime from every matching upstream release git tag, then
merges those discovered versions with pinned versions in
`generic/java/versions.yml`.
